scripts.build: npm run build -w @market-copilot/shared && npm run build -w @market-copilot/api && npm run build -w @market-copilot/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @market-copilot/shared && npm run typecheck -w @market-copilot/api && npm run typecheck -w @market-copilot/web
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @market-copilot/shared && npm run lint -w @market-copilot/api && npm run lint -w @market-copilot/web
